flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Savannah Technical College fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($4.0k → $3.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Savannah Technical College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (47.7% → 55.8%).
